description: P1-1 Roboflow public-corpus warm-start defaults. Public-only pretrain; owner in-domain labels remain the finisher.

data_policy.heldout_policy: No Outdoor/Indoor/Burlington/Wolverine labels or held-out ledger rows are read. Loader construction checks 35 protected eval dHashes before training.
data_policy.image_copy_policy: Index-based original image paths only; no image cache is created by default.
data_policy.vm_path_policy: If the VM checkout root differs from the Mac path stored in the index, pass --image-root-rewrite OLD_PREFIX=NEW_PREFIX.

visibility_policy.reason: Public Roboflow labels lack the four-level visibility taxonomy, so they keep visibility_level absent and receive the clear-frame WBCE weight instead of invented occlusion weights.

checkpoint_shape_policy.reason: Official WASB tennis checkpoints use a 3-channel final heatmap head; keep the default compatible unless a checkpoint-specific override is passed.

mixing_policy.reason: Core pickleball should dominate; adjacent racket-sport sources are a small regularizer for ball appearance and occlusion, not pickleball-domain diversity.
